function.name: memory_list_notes
function.description: Structured list (JSON). Also redundant with vault snapshot yet useful after large edits — confirms latest tree.

function.name: memory_read_file
function.description: Read one vault Markdown file by vault-relative POSIX path.

function.name: memory_edit
function.description: PRIMARY update tool — replace ONE unique substring in an existing note (oldString must occur exactly once). Prefer for paths already listed in the injected vault snapshot.

oldString.description: exact slice to replace — must occur exactly once; include ±2 lines for uniqueness.

function.name: memory_write_file
function.description: Create **ONLY** NEW notes whose Path token is missing from vault snapshot row list; otherwise misuse → duplicates.

function.name: memory_search
function.description: Cheap grep across filenames + bodies when snapshot titles insufficient for resolution.
